creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 233417
photograph of the dialogue in the installer for FreeBSD 13.1-RC4

> There is multiple "FreeBSD" efi boot entries, …

– should be: 

> There are multiple "FreeBSD" EFI boot entries, …

– or: 

> There are multiple EFI boot entries for FreeBSD, …
